Package ca.team4308.absolutelib.wrapper

Interface EncoderWrapper

All Known Implementing Classes:
EncoderWrapper.CANCoderImpl, EncoderWrapper.DioEncoderImpl, EncoderWrapper.DutyCycleEncoderImpl, EncoderWrapper.GenericAbsoluteRotationsImpl, EncoderWrapper.GenericCountsImpl, EncoderWrapper.GenericMechanismRotationsImpl, EncoderWrapper.TalonFXIntegratedImpl
public interface EncoderWrapper
EncoderWrapper provides a minimal, vendor-agnostic interface for fetching and setting linear position (in meters). Use the static factory helpers to create wrappers for common encoder types, or implement the interface yourself for custom sensors.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static class 
    EncoderWrapper.CANCoderImpl
    Simple CANCoder implementation performing unit conversions to meters.
    static class 
    EncoderWrapper.DioEncoderImpl
    WPILib DIO encoder implementation with offset for setPositionMeters.
    static class 
    EncoderWrapper.DutyCycleEncoderImpl
    WPILib DutyCycleEncoder absolute implementation with offset for setPositionMeters.
    static class 
    EncoderWrapper.GenericAbsoluteRotationsImpl
    Generic absolute rotations-based implementation (sensor rotations in [0,1)).
    static class 
    EncoderWrapper.GenericCountsImpl
    Generic counts-based implementation.
    static class 
    EncoderWrapper.GenericMechanismRotationsImpl
    Generic mechanism-rotations implementation.
    static class 
    EncoderWrapper.TalonFXIntegratedImpl
    TalonFX integrated sensor implementation.

    Method
    Description

    canCoder(int canId, double gearRatio, double countsPerRev, double drumDiameter)
    Create a CANCoder-backed encoder wrapper.

    dioEncoder(int channelA, int channelB, boolean reversed, double gearRatio, double countsPerRev, double drumDiameter)
    DIO-based WPILib Encoder (incremental).
    static EncoderWrapper
    dutyCycleEncoder(int channel, double gearRatio, double drumDiameter)
    DutyCycleEncoder absolute position (adds offset for setPositionMeters).
    double
    getPositionMeters()
    Current linear position in meters.
    default boolean
    isAbsolute()
    Returns true if this encoder is absolute (position persists across power cycles).
    static EncoderWrapper
    ofAbsoluteRotations0To1(Supplier<Double> getSensorRotations, double gearRatio, double drumDiameter)
    Generic factory for absolute sensors that report position as sensor rotations in [0,1).
    static EncoderWrapper
    ofEncoderCounts(Supplier<Double> getCounts, DoubleConsumer setCounts, double gearRatio, double countsPerRev, double drumDiameter)
    Generic factory from raw encoder counts (ticks).
    static EncoderWrapper
    ofMechanismRotations(Supplier<Double> getMechanismRotations, DoubleConsumer setMechanismRotations, double drumDiameter)
    Generic factory from mechanism rotations directly.
    void
    setPositionMeters(double meters)
    Reset/report the linear position in meters (if supported by the underlying sensor).
    static EncoderWrapper
    talonFXIntegrated(int canId, double gearRatio, double drumDiameter)
    TalonFX integrated sensor (uses 2048 counts per rev by default).
    static EncoderWrapper
    talonFXIntegrated(int canId, double gearRatio, double countsPerRev, double drumDiameter)
    TalonFX integrated sensor with custom counts per rev (normally 2048).

  • Method Details

    • getPositionMeters

      double getPositionMeters()
      Current linear position in meters.

    • setPositionMeters

      void setPositionMeters(double meters)
      Reset/report the linear position in meters (if supported by the underlying sensor).

    • isAbsolute

      default boolean isAbsolute()
      Returns true if this encoder is absolute (position persists across power cycles).

    • canCoder

      static EncoderWrapper canCoder(int canId, double gearRatio, double countsPerRev, double drumDiameter)
      Create a CANCoder-backed encoder wrapper.
      Parameters:
      canId - CAN ID of the CANCoder
      gearRatio - Sensor rotations per mechanism rotation
      countsPerRev - Native counts per encoder revolution (e.g. 4096 or 4028)
      drumDiameter - Mechanism drum diameter (meters) for linear conversion

    • talonFXIntegrated

      static EncoderWrapper talonFXIntegrated(int canId, double gearRatio, double drumDiameter)
      TalonFX integrated sensor (uses 2048 counts per rev by default).

    • talonFXIntegrated

      static EncoderWrapper talonFXIntegrated(int canId, double gearRatio, double countsPerRev, double drumDiameter)
      TalonFX integrated sensor with custom counts per rev (normally 2048).

    • dioEncoder

      static EncoderWrapper dioEncoder(int channelA, int channelB, boolean reversed, double gearRatio, double countsPerRev, double drumDiameter)
      DIO-based WPILib Encoder (incremental).

    • dutyCycleEncoder

      static EncoderWrapper dutyCycleEncoder(int channel, double gearRatio, double drumDiameter)
      DutyCycleEncoder absolute position (adds offset for setPositionMeters).

    • ofEncoderCounts

      static EncoderWrapper ofEncoderCounts(Supplier<Double> getCounts, DoubleConsumer setCounts, double gearRatio, double countsPerRev, double drumDiameter)
      Generic factory from raw encoder counts (ticks).

    • ofMechanismRotations

      static EncoderWrapper ofMechanismRotations(Supplier<Double> getMechanismRotations, DoubleConsumer setMechanismRotations, double drumDiameter)
      Generic factory from mechanism rotations directly.

    • ofAbsoluteRotations0To1

      static EncoderWrapper ofAbsoluteRotations0To1(Supplier<Double> getSensorRotations, double gearRatio, double drumDiameter)
      Generic factory for absolute sensors that report position as sensor rotations in [0,1). Maintains an internal offset to emulate setPositionMeters.
